entry.title: New: Bill 19 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AUTHORIZING THE MAYOR TO ENTER INTO AN INTERGOVERNMENTAL AGREEMENT WITH THE U.S. GEOLOGICAL SURVEY" The purpose of this bill is to enter into a joint funding agreement with USGS on groundwater availability study in West Maui.

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
